---
name: Settings UI contract
description: UX rules for user-facing settings components
applyTo: "src/components/settings/**"
---

# Settings UI contract — see [`src/AGENTS.md`](../../src/AGENTS.md)

Authoritative UX rules for settings components live in the "Settings UI
contract" section of [`src/AGENTS.md`](../../src/AGENTS.md). Nearest-AGENTS.md
wins per the [agents.md spec](https://agents.md/).

This file exists so Copilot picks the rules up path-scoped when editing
`src/components/settings/**`. If a rule needs to change, edit
`src/AGENTS.md`.
